---
title: 'Tigris: Architecture and Algorithms for 3D Perception in Point Clouds'
author:
- Tiancheng Xu
- Boyuan Tian
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3352460.3358259
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/tigris-architecture-and-algorithms-for-3d-perception-in-point-clouds
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/PointCloud-pipeline
journ: MICRO
year: 2019
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
teaser: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/tigris-architecture-and-algorithms-for-3d-perception-in-point-clouds-bb57ecf8-f0e3-42d2-8fd4-c19a1dc0b942
award: Best Paper Nominee
pub_number: 32
---
